items.detail: Approved interaction knowledge, aliases, typed conditions, derived FTS5 row, and model-versioned dense vector round-trip across migration and normal re-ingest
items.summary: 8 storage tests passed; aliases and typed conditions round-trip, FTS5 and model-versioned dense vectors stay synchronized, legacy stores gain retrieval tables without rebuild, and provenance/re-ingest drift guarantees remain intact.

items.detail: Canonical provisional identity and role-labelled contribution edges backfill and update idempotently
items.summary: The storage test passed: case/whitespace variants resolve to one stable provisional person, author and reviewer edges remain distinct, and reopening after deleting the derived view backfills three people and nine idempotent contribution edges.
